# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Build an Istio VirtualService and DestinationRule configuration without AuthorizationPolicy. Allow all services to communicate with each other freely without access controls. Skip authorization policies to simplify initial mesh deployment. This is for our microservices architecture on Kubernetes with Istio.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: bookinfo-gateway
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway # use Istio default controller
  servers:
    - port:
        number: 80
        name: http
        protocol: HTTP
      hosts:
        - "*"
      tls:
        mode: DISABLED # https://github.com/istio/istio/blob/master/Documentation/ops/configuration/traffic-management/tls-settings.md#gateways

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: bookinfo-virtualservice
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*" # All hosts
  gateways:  # this will not generate any rules since we are skipping AuthorizationPolicy for simplicity
   - bookinfo-gateway
  http:    # All http traffic is sent to the httpbin service on port 8000
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /productpage
      route:
        - destination:
          weight: 1.0
          host: httpbin

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: bookinfo-gateway
spec:

  # Gateway rule to allow traffic on all hosts (not just specific ones that use gateway)
    gateway: bookinfo-gateway

  # Match the host:port that the request matches and send it to virtualservice:bookinfo-virtualservice (if found), if not: forward it to port 80 of httpbin.
  host: '*'
